export const awards = [{
  title: "Medalha de Mérito das Comunidades Portuguesas",
  issuer: "Portuguese Government",
  year: null,
  description: "Personally presented by Secretary of State José Cesário in recognition of exceptional service to the Portuguese Canadian community. One of the most prestigious honours the Portuguese government bestows upon members of its diaspora.",
  photo: "2025-DadPortugalAwad.jpg",
  photoCaption: "Receiving the Medalha de Mérito from Secretary of State José Cesário"
}, {
  title: "Certificate of Exemplary Service to Canada",
  issuer: "Government of Canada",
  year: "2025",
  description: "Awarded in honour of the Coronation of His Majesty King Charles III, recognizing extraordinary contribution and service to the community over a lifetime of dedication to Canadians of Portuguese heritage.",
  photo: "img_canada.jpg",
  photoCaption: "Certificate of Exemplary Service to Canada — presented to António Joaquim Pereira Alves do Forno"
}, {
  title: "Honorary Consul of Portugal",
  issuer: "Government of Portugal",
  year: "1998",
  description: "Named Honorary Consul of Portugal in 1998 — one of the highest distinctions awarded to a Portuguese Canadian community leader. This appointment recognized four decades of service bridging the Portuguese and Canadian communities.",
  photo: "img_11.jpg",
  photoCaption: "Honorary Consul of Portugal appointment, 1998"
}, {
  title: "Meeting with President Sampaio & Premier Bob Rae",
  issuer: "Province of Ontario",
  year: "1993",
  description: "Received at an official reception with Portuguese President Jorge Sampaio and Ontario Premier Bob Rae, in recognition of his role as a key leader of the Portuguese Canadian community in Southwestern Ontario.",
  photo: "img_06.jpg",
  photoCaption: "With President Sampaio and Premier Bob Rae, 1993"
}, {
  title: "Fourth Degree Knight",
  issuer: "Knights of Columbus",
  year: "2003",
  description: "The highest honour awarded by the Knights of Columbus, recognizing a lifetime of service, faith, and dedication to the organization and the broader community spanning over 40 years.",
  photo: null,
  photoCaption: null
}, {
  title: "Listed in Who's Who in Portuguese Communities",
  issuer: "Portuguese Communities Publication",
  year: "1989",
  description: "Recognized among the most prominent and influential members of Portuguese communities across North America — a testament to his reputation and reach far beyond Southwestern Ontario.",
  photo: null,
  photoCaption: null
}, {
  title: "Volunteer Service Awards",
  issuer: "Province of Ontario & City of Chatham",
  year: null,
  description: "Received multiple volunteer service awards from the Province of Ontario and the City of Chatham over the decades, honouring his tireless commitment to community service.",
  photo: null,
  photoCaption: null
}, {
  title: "Portuguese Canadian Walk of Fame — 2026 Nominee",
  issuer: "Portuguese Canadian Walk of Fame",
  year: "2026",
  description: "Nominated posthumously for the 2026 Portuguese Canadian Walk of Fame in recognition of his extraordinary lifetime of service to the Portuguese Canadian community of Southwestern Ontario — over four decades of leadership, advocacy, and community building.",
  photo: null,
  photoCaption: null
}];
